requirement_topic.en: ANME Renewable-Energy Documentation and Import Classification
requirement_topic.zh: ANME可再生能源文件和进口归类
requirement_topic.zht: ANME再生能源文件和進口歸類

summary.en: ANME publishes renewable-energy, self-generation, installer, accepted-equipment, and regulatory resources for Tunisia energy projects. For BESS paired with PV, self-generation, or utility projects, exporters should confirm whether ANME program documents, accepted-equipment lists, tender documents, incentives, or energy-ministry approvals impose equipment, installer, technical-file, or local-language requirements. Separately, each BESS component should be classified for customs and import treatment by HS code.
summary.zh: ANME发布突尼斯能源项目的可再生能源、自发电、安装商、接受设备和监管资源。对于与光伏、自发电或公用事业项目配套的BESS，出口商应确认ANME项目文件、接受设备清单、招标文件、激励政策或能源主管部门批准是否提出设备、安装商、技术文件或当地语言要求。另应按HS编码对每个BESS部件进行海关和进口处理归类。
summary.zht: ANME發布突尼西亞能源項目的再生能源、自發電、安裝商、接受設備和監管資源。對於與光伏、自發電或公用事業項目配套的BESS，出口商應確認ANME項目文件、接受設備清單、招標文件、激勵政策或能源主管部門批准是否提出設備、安裝商、技術文件或當地語言要求。另應按HS編碼對每個BESS部件進行海關和進口處理歸類。

standards_or_laws: ANME eligible installer and accepted-equipment lists where applicable
Tunisia customs and import classification by HS code

summary.en: China export files commonly include commercial invoices, packing lists, HS classifications, certificates of origin, China test reports, and factory quality documents. These should be reconciled with Tunisia customs classification and any ANME or project-specific technical-file expectations.
summary.zh: 中国出口文件通常包括商业发票、装箱单、HS归类、原产地证、中国测试报告和工厂质量文件。这些文件应与突尼斯海关归类以及任何ANME或项目特定技术文件要求相协调。
summary.zht: 中國出口文件通常包括商業發票、裝箱單、HS歸類、原產地證、中國測試報告和工廠品質文件。這些文件應與突尼西亞海關歸類以及任何ANME或項目特定技術文件要求相協調。

standards_or_laws: GB 44240-2024 and GB/T 36276-2023 technical reports where relevant

gap.en: Before shipment, map cells, modules, racks, PCS, containers, HVAC, fire systems, transformers, switchgear, and controls to HS codes and project documents. Confirm whether the Tunisia route requires French or Arabic labels, manuals, warranty terms, local installer evidence, or accepted-equipment listing.
gap.zh: 出货前，应将电芯、模组、电池架、PCS、集装箱、HVAC、消防系统、变压器、开关设备和控制系统映射至HS编码及项目文件。应确认突尼斯路径是否要求法语或阿拉伯语标签、手册、质保条款、当地安装商证据或接受设备清单。
gap.zht: 出貨前，應將電芯、模組、電池架、PCS、集裝箱、HVAC、消防系統、變壓器、開關設備和控制系統映射至HS編碼及項目文件。應確認突尼西亞路徑是否要求法語或阿拉伯語標籤、手冊、質保條款、當地安裝商證據或接受設備清單。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory where Tunisia customs, ANME program rules, energy-ministry approval, tender, incentive, owner, insurer, lender, or contract calls up the import or project-document route; otherwise project-specific
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for China export documentation and customs treatment; China technical reports remain support unless required by Tunisia project documents

source.publisher: Agence Nationale pour la Maîtrise de l'Energie (ANME)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat ANME and import documentation as a project gate, especially for PV-paired or self-generation BESS. Align HS codes, local-language documents, and accepted-equipment expectations before shipment.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将ANME和进口文件作为项目关口处理，尤其是光伏配套或自发电BESS。出货前应协调HS编码、当地语言文件和接受设备要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將ANME和進口文件作為項目關口處理，尤其是光伏配套或自發電BESS。出貨前應協調HS編碼、當地語言文件和接受設備要求。
